description:
BA connected allows users to link their digital signage authoring to a robust networking management solution


Improvements
- BCN-17920: Added new elements to the Diagnostic Web Server (DWS) UI to for BrightSign Built-in products.
- BCN-17961: Updated icons and header to reflect new logos.
- BCN-18010: Updated the splash screen with new logos.
- BCN-18032: Improved the "Add Player" provisioning process.
- BCN-18078: Added support for the CL435 model (custom model based on the LS445).
- BCN-18099: Updated the styling of the consent banners to match recent UI changes.
- BCN-18112: Updated the terminology across the app to reflect the new styling of the app name (BrightAuthor:connected is now written as brightAuthor connected).
Bug Fixes
- BCN-11298: Fixed an issue where a failure would occur when trying to export a presentation with HTML 5 content on Windows whereas the same export would work fine on macOS.
- BCN-17924: Fixed an issue where descenders (the part of the lowercase letter that extends below the baseline of the font) of the media title (during Upload New Media) is cropped.
- BCN-17932: (DWS) Fixed an issue where the Flash tab is displayed twice.
- BCN-18023: Addressed the error Cannot set properties of undefined (setting 'isLoaderEnabled') which could adversely affect the saving of Simple presentations.
- BCN-18075: Fixed an issue where various names under a presentation’s audio settings were displaying the key (the variable name used in the code) instead of the label (the human-friendly text value of the variable).
- PE-805: Fixed an issue where downloads of EDID binaries from the DWS would be corrupted.
